author: codex (rotation authored after sealed v1 adjudication)
policy: sealed: never used for training; one adjudication cycle, then rotate before tuning
purpose: successor measurement slice after sealed_boundary_slice_v1 was consumed

cases.input: 移行方針は承認済みです。担当者が迷わないよう、準備から切り替え確認までを実行順に分解してください。
承認された移行方針にはどんな利点があるのか、簡潔に説明してください。
配送費を計算してください。ただし荷物の重量と配送先はまだ伝えていません。
荷物は12キロで配送先は大阪です。提示された配送費が料金表と一致するか確認してください。
We selected the authentication approach. Break the rollout into ordered implementation tasks.
Describe why the selected authentication approach is appropriate.
Calculate the required storage, but I have not provided the retention period or daily volume.
Retention is 90 days and daily volume is 40 GB. Verify that the proposed capacity is sufficient.
監視方式を決定する前に、候補を複数挙げて長所と短所を比較してください。
監視方式は決定しました。設定、通知試験、運用開始までの作業計画を作ってください。
Check whether every subtotal matches the final amount.
Validate this conclusion against the evidence provided.
Create a step-by-step delivery plan from these requirements.
Organize the remaining implementation work into executable tasks.
Ask which operating system I use before giving installation commands.
The budget depends on team size, which I have not stated. Ask for it first.
Summarize the discussion in four concise bullets.
Reduce these meeting notes to the key decisions and actions.
Suggest several possible ways to reduce deployment risk.
Compare a few alternative designs we could investigate.
What does DNS stand for?
Name the largest planet in the Solar System.
